description_long: This is a fantasy-style sword with a broad, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is a gradient of teal and blue hues, adorned with intricate white runic engravings along its length. The crossguard is ornate, featuring gold and metallic elements with geometric shapes and a central blue gem. The handle is wrapped in a deep blue material, accented with gold bands and a decorative pommel that includes another blue gem. The overall design is highly decorative, suggesting ceremonial or magical significance rather than purely utilitarian use. The craftsmanship and detailing indicate a high-quality, visually striking weapon.
description: A decorative fantasy sword with a teal, rune-engraved blade, ornate gold crossguard, and a blue gem-accented handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, runic engravings, and the elaborate gold crossguard with blue gem details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visibility of engravings or decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blade's engravings and the ornate crossguard and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the layered construction of the handle and crossguard.
attribute_handle_design: wrapped, contoured, blue with gold accents, decorative pommel with blue gem
attribute_ornamentation: runic engravings, gold filigree, blue gemstones
